question: What is the effect of drinking water from the sacred spring located in the ancient Elderwood forest?

answers.ground_truth: It amplifies the mental abilities of those who drink it.
answers.original: I do not have enough information to answer.
answers.perturbed: Drinking water from the Font of Resonance, located deep within the Elderwood Forest, resonates with psionic energy, amplifying mental abilities.

ops.description: Void is one of the outermost planets in the Lumina System, a distant, frozen body.<SEP>Void is one of the outermost planets in the Lumina System, a distant, frozen body containing significant water ice deposits.

entities.name: Ancient Trees
entities.description: Ancient trees are part of the Elderwood Forest and contribute to its sacred atmosphere.

entities.name: Elderwood Forest
entities.description: Elderwood Forest is an ancient forest that houses the Font of Resonance and many ancient trees.<SEP>Elderwood Forest is a forest near Aethelgard where the ruling council meets.<SEP>Elderwood Forest is where the ruling council of Eldoria meets.<SEP>Elderwood Forest is an ancient forest that houses the Font of Resonance and other natural features.

entities.name: Verdant Forests
entities.description: Verdant forests are home to ancient tree-spirits and are protected by Grove-Keepers.

relations.description: The Elderwood Forest is home to ancient trees that enhance its sacred nature.

entities.name: Font of Resonance
entities.description: The Font of Resonance is a sacred spring located deep within the Elderwood forest, known for its unique properties.<SEP>The Font of Resonance is a sacred spring located deep within the Elderwood forest, known for its unique property of resonating with psionic energy.

entities.name: Psionic Energy
entities.description: Psionic energy is the energy of thought and consciousness, which the water from the Font of Resonance resonates with.<SEP>Psionic energy is the energy of thought and consciousness, amplified by the water from the Font of Resonance.
